IERC20","name":"token","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"}],"name":"withdraw","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"This is not a real AMM. There is no curve, no fee, no slippage from      depth. The \"live\" price is `basePrice + jitter(block.timestamp)` where      jitter is a deterministic value in `[-jitterRange, +jitterRange]`      derived from a 5-second timestamp bucket. Because jitter is fully      deterministic and visible on-chain, a bot could time txs to land in      the cheapest bucket \u2014 fine for a live demo, NOT acceptable for real      money. Use only in demos.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. o97T9jZUrk5sz3sdtR"]},"node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x982c5cb790ab941d1e04f807120a71709d4c313ba0bfc16006447ffbd27fbbd5","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8150ceb4ac947e8a442b2a9c017e01e880b2be2dd958f1fa9bc405f4c5a86508","dweb:/ipfs/QmbcBmFX66AY6Kbhnd5gx7zpkgqnUafo43XnmayAM7zVdB"]},"node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/Context.sol":{"keccak256":"0x493033a8d1b176a037b2cc6a04dad01a5c157722049bbecf632ca876224dd4b2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6a708e8a5bdb1011c2c381c9a5cfd8a9a956d7d0a9dc1bd8bcdaf52f76ef2f12","dweb:/ipfs/Qmax9WHBnVsZP46ZxEMNRQpLQnrdE4dK8LehML1Py8FowF"]},"node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"src/demo/MockRWA.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcc1dc35da243ed090ce056f96a26014d617c1407304ed5135d71a0a33f79014e","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://78103ca78c06d5610da28ca4f41f8699f38954be9c70ec818df4bbd91e652b8f","dweb:/ipfs/QmXTrHTqrtXToiZD24x2zKHFxYvHgPNS33XBgReBxGXw6w"]},"src/demo/MockSwap.sol":{"keccak256":"0x76bd04aeed34e8c92bcb495a82a8ba20f7a6762ad027f484bc3329c6284d2f7c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://cda74ca8250f4390ec8d824e22f119577a2d4ffaad134bcccab9392ddf1797a7","dweb:/ipfs/QmThNfxy3q5anCfPCrBtEZkxJCrQ64h9hyuNDDeAyEdViH"]}},"version":1}

params.initialJitter: Initial jitter range in USDC's smallest unit.                       Pass `0` to disable jitter. Must be strictly less                       than `initialPrice` so the live price stays > 0.
params.initialPrice: Initial BASELINE price in USDC's smallest unit per                       whole RWA token (e.g. `200_000` = 0.20 USDC/share).

returns.price: Live price in USDC's smallest unit (6 decimals).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setJitter(uint256).details: Owner-only. Must be strictly less than `pricePerShare` so the      live price stays positive. Pass `0` to disable jitter entirely.

setPrice(uint256).details: Owner-only. Reverts if the existing `jitterRange` would no longer      fit under the new baseline.

swap(uint256,uint256,address).details: Caller must `approve(this, usdcIn)` on USDC first. Follows      checks-effects-interactions: pulls USDC, then sends RWA last.

params.minRwaOut: Revert if the resulting RWA output is less than this.
params.recipient: Address that receives the RWA tokens.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

withdraw(address,uint256,address).details: Owner-only. Intentionally unrestricted on which token can be      withdrawn; this is a demo, not a treasury.

JITTER_BUCKET_SECONDS().notice: Width of each timestamp bucket in seconds. The jitter value is         constant within a bucket so `quote()` agrees with the next         `swap()` happening in the same window, and the displayed price         doesn't strobe every block.

RWA_TOKEN().notice: The mocked RWA token paid out. 18 decimals.

USDC().notice: USDC accepted for swaps. Expected to be Circle's Base Sepolia         USDC at 0x036CbD53842c5426634e7929541eC2318f3dCF7e (6 decimals).

getPrice().notice: Live quoted price for the current timestamp bucket. This is         what the next swap (executed in the same 5-second window) will         use. UIs should poll this for the ticker display.

jitterRange().notice: Maximum deviation the live price can take above or below the         baseline, in USDC's smallest unit (6 decimals). e.g. `20_000`         means the live price walks within ±0.02 USDC of `pricePerShare`.         Set to zero to disable jitter (price always equals baseline).

pricePerShare().notice: Baseline price in USDC's smallest unit (6 decimals) for one         whole RWA token (1e18). e.g. `200_000` = 0.20 USDC per share.

quote(uint256).notice: View helper: how much RWA you would receive for `usdcIn` USDC         right now, at the live `getPrice()`. Cheap to call from a         frontend before quoting the user.

swap(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Swap `usdcIn` USDC for RWA tokens at the live `getPrice()`.

withdraw(address,uint256,address).notice: Pull any ERC20 out of the contract — used to refund collected         USDC or to drain RWA liquidity between demos.
